name: Oxeye
description: Oxeye — Cloud-native SAST and IAST platform tracing vulnerabilities through microservice architectures with context awareness.

seo.title: Oxeye — Security Scanning / Mobile App Sec
seo.meta_description: Oxeye: Oxeye — Cloud-native SAST and IAST platform tracing vulnerabilities through microservice architectures with context awareness.

when_to_use: Cloud-native SAST with microservice context tracing
IAST instrumentation for runtime vulnerability confirmation
API security testing across containerized service boundaries
DevSecOps pipeline integration for pre-merge security scans
OWASP Top 10 detection with microservice call chain analysis

pros: Traces vulnerabilities across microservice call graphs
Handles polyglot codebases better than classic SAST
cons: Acquired by GitLab in 2024, standalone future unclear
Less valuable for monoliths and simple apps
Fewer integrations than established SAST vendors
review.verdict: Clever cloud-native AppSec approach, though post-GitLab acquisition the standalone product story is murky.
review.best_for: Cloud-native shops with heavy microservice sprawl needing cross-service vulnerability tracing.
review.not_for: Monolith codebases, small apps, or teams wanting a long-term independent vendor.
